span.p: Low tier AND permitted SDD category

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Run the customer-risk-rating model FIRST
customer type x product x geography x channel

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Any EDD trigger present?
PEP, high-risk jurisdiction, opaque ownership,
large unexplained cash, correspondent/nested

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EDD - enhanced depth
independent verification + senior approval
+ recorded rationale-to-proceed
+ shorter refresh cadence

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: What did the CRR model output?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CDD - standard depth
identity, beneficial ownership,
source of funds, expected activity

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SDD - reduced depth
reduced verification +
DOCUMENTED basis for the reduction
